data.name: 獸娘萌娘溫泉旅館
data.detailed_description:
遊戲為官方中文，原汁原味製作，H感十足
社保程度絕對滿點，各種溫柔美嬌獸娘更加帶勁~CV也相對而言更加成熟！

在黑心公司辛苦了一天之後，男主在某個森林裡跌倒，然後遇到了幫助他的狐狸、兔子、貓跟狼。他們說他們是動物的精靈，想要報答曾經拯救過森林的男主，並且招待他到精靈的溫泉旅館。獸耳娘們都很仰慕男主，所以各個積極、真心而且色情的侍奉。在溫泉旅館悠閒享受的同時與可愛的獸耳娘親親我我度過美好時光。

「因為溫泉身體舒服了很多……我是真沒想到你們居然會給我做這樣的按摩……」
「厲害，很舒服。我在尤娜裡面射出來。這樣做的話，明明會懷孕。因為小穴太舒服了」
「全身淋浴著大量射出的白濁液，獸娘老婆們的母乳更是污染婚紗，到達絕頂。」

和獸耳娘共度甜蜜溫泉旅行~肆情交歡的四天三夜~
絕對值得體驗！


特点:
  • 从原装日本VN本地化。
    [*獸耳娘带有日文语音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3图质。
  • 多小时的内容。
  • 带有音乐和音效。
  • 带有角色动态。
  • 带有收藏展览。
  • 多个与獸耳娘H的剧情。

「兽耳萌娘温泉旅馆」是一个英文本地化的VN，由著名日本制作室 Norn/Miel所创作。我们在cherry kiss樱桃社试图将日本游戏带到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和图片都属成人并没有任何未成年人物用于这游戏里。

data.short_description: 和兽耳娘共度甜蜜温泉旅行~肆情交欢的四天三夜~
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Tails & Titties Hot Spring
data.detailed_description:
Sick of working for some crappy company, one brave employee takes a stand! Now out of a job after kiboshing their plans to destroy a nearby forest, karma won’t let this good deed go unrewarded. While hiking through the recently saved woods, our hero is exhausted and passes out, not before hearing... a bunch of female voices? Turns out he's pretty famous among the local spirits and monster girls, and all of them are eager to show their savior some serious "appreciation" during his stay at an illusive hot spring that was hidden deep in the forest.

There is the sexy foxgirl Hatsune, Ruri the shy bunnygirl, the cute and quiet catgirl named Shione, and the charming big momma herself, Yuuna the wolf girl; all four of them are all yours to enjoy, from their bouncy tits to their fluffy tails, during your stay at the Tails & Titties Hot Spring!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • All Girls are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Plenty of sexy fun in the hot springs with a cast of cute monster girls!

Tails & Titties Hot Spring Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: After shutting down a shady company hell bent on chopping down a forest, the local spirits and monster girls repay you with an unforgettable hot spring experience! (it's unforgettable because you have sex, ok?)
